headline: CAH Q1 Deep Dive: Specialty Growth, Tariff Dynamics, and Margin Pressures Shape Cardinal Health’s Outlook
summary: Healthcare distributor and services company Cardinal Health (NYSE:CAH) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales rose 11% year on year to $60.94 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.17 per share was 13.7% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
